name: aQuickRescue
description: Emergency Health Data Access Platform - FHIR & Audit Compliant

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=shared
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=shared
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=shared
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=frontend && npm run lint:fix --workspace=shared
